message:
chore: add cache_budget_kb field to all test DbPoolConfig literals

Mechanical update — every test constructing DbPoolConfig gains
cache_budget_kb: DEFAULT_CACHE_BUDGET_KB to satisfy the new required
field. No behavioral change. Also update beads issue tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
